description: Use this API to return an array of real values for subsystem VSC dc line converters. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.3.0. ierr, rarray = avscdcconvreal(sid, ties, flag, entry, string)
python_syntax: ierr, rarray = avscdcconvreal(sid, ties, flag, entry, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the bus subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: ties
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem converter buses of vsc dc lines to include (ignored if sid is negative). (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem vsc dc line converters to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: entry
parameters.description: A flag indicating organization. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the VSC dc line converter quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: rarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

sid.description: to instruct the API to assume a subsystem containing all buses in the working case.
valid bus subsystem identifier. Valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. Subsystem SID must have been previously defined.

ties.description: for each end of interior subsystem VSC dc lines only.
for the subsystem bus end of tie VSC dc lines only.
for the non-subsystem bus end of tie VSC dc lines only.
for each end of tie VSC dc lines only.
for each end of interior subsystem VSC dc lines and the subsystem bus end of tie VSC dc lines.
for each end of interior subsystem VSC dc lines and tie VSC dc lines.

flag.description: for only in-service converters of in-service VSC dc lines.
for all converters of in-service VSC dc lines.
for all converters of all VSC dc lines.

string.description: ac current in amps at the from bus.
ac current in pu at the from bus.
MVA as a percent of MVA rating (more restrictive of SMAX and IMAX) at the from bus.
From bus dc voltage in kV.
dc setpoint (kV or MW) at the from bus.
ac setpoint (power factor or pu voltage) at the from bus.
From bus A loss coefficient in kW.
From bus B loss coefficient in kW/amp.
From bus minimum converter losses in kW.
From bus converter MVA rating.
From bus converter current rating in amps.
From bus power weighting factor fraction.
Percent of total Mvar to be contributed by this converter.
Apparent active power flow into the dc line at the from bus, in MW.
Apparent reactive power flow into the dc line at the from bus, in Mvar.
Apparent ac power flow into the dc line at the from bus, in MVA.
Total active power losses, in MW.
Total reactive power losses, in Mvar.
Reactive power upper limit, in Mvar.
Reactive power lower limit, in Mvar.
Apparent active power flow into the dc line at the from bus (units determined by power output options).
Apparent reactive power flow into the dc line at the from bus (units determined by power output options).
Apparent ac power flow into the dc line at the from bus (units determined by power output options).
Total active power losses (units determined by power output options).
Total reactive power losses (units determined by power output options).
Reactive power upper limit (units determined by power output options).
Reactive power lower limit (units determined by power output options).

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of RARRAY, is not large enough.
